comment: Synthetic metastatic ALK-rearranged NSCLC for CSD-1 partnership BMA test suite. NOT a real patient (CHARTER §9.3). NOTE: BMA-NTRK-FUSION-IFS does not exist in the KB; substituted ALK-rearranged NSCLC as the closest pan-tumor TKI-targeted IA/Level-1 actionability cell available. BMA lookup should hit BMA-ALK-FUSION-NSCLC at ESCAT IA / OncoKB Level 1.
